title: Pyrus schuwerkiorum

intro: Pyrus schuwerkiorum, also known as Schuwerik's pear, is a species of pear tree native to the Caucasus region. The bark and leaves of Pyrus schuwerkiorum have been traditionally used in folk medicine for their health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in treating various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems.
